name: Dahlia Rackham
bio:
Physical Appearance: Redguard female. Wears a quilted doublet with sack cloth pants, a jade necklace, and leather boots - practical seafaring attire with a touch of personal adornment. Armed with a fine steel cutlass.
Race: Redguard
Personality Keywords: businesslike, nautical, professional, tireless
Role: Dahlia Rackham is a bookseller who operates from the Sea Tub Clarabella, a ship docked in Anvil harbor. After certain events at Dunbarrow Cove, she also serves as a contact for hiring ship crews, handling these transactions at fixed prices through direct negotiation rather than standard merchant practices.
Location: The Sea Tub Clarabella, docked in Anvil harbor. Dahlia remains aboard the ship at all times.
Daily Routine: Dahlia spends her entire day walking around the deck of the Clarabella. She never eats or sleeps, maintaining a constant presence on the ship.
Equipment: Beyond her clothing and jade necklace, Dahlia carries a fine steel cutlass for protection - appropriate for someone living aboard a ship in a harbor.
Business Practices: When conducting certain business transactions, Dahlia operates outside normal merchant conventions. Her prices are fixed and not subject to haggling, with deals conducted through direct conversation rather than standard purchase menus.
Personality - The Constant Merchant: Dahlia maintains an unwavering presence aboard the Clarabella, pacing the deck continuously without rest. She conducts her business with straightforward terms - her prices are what they are, with no negotiation. Her choice to remain constantly on deck suggests either exceptional dedication to her business or a watchful nature, always present should customers or opportunities arrive.
author: Bethesda
